name: Chicken & Artichoke Salad with Yogurt Dressing

ingredients.item:
6 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
olive oil, for brushing
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
300g (10½oz) watercress
500g (1lb 2oz) artichoke hearts preserved in oil, drained and halved
100g (3½oz) walnut pieces
1 x 20g packet of chives, each stem snipped into 3
1 x 20g packet of flat leaf parsley, leaves picked and barely chopped
1 x 20g packet of mint, leaves picked and barely chopped
2 red onions, cut in half and thinly sliced into half moons
2 long red chillies, thinly sliced into rings
300g (10½oz) feta cheese
ingredients.original:
6 boneless, skinless chicken breasts
olive oil, for brushing
sea salt
freshly ground black pepper
300g (10½oz) watercress
500g (1lb 2oz) artichoke hearts preserved in oil, drained and halved
100g (3½oz) walnut pieces
1 x 20g packet of chives, each stem snipped into 3
1 x 20g packet of flat leaf parsley, leaves picked and barely chopped
1 x 20g packet of mint, leaves picked and barely chopped
2 red onions, cut in half and thinly sliced into half moons
2 long red chillies, thinly sliced into rings
300g (10½oz) feta cheese

ingredients.item:
300g (10½oz) Greek yogurt
1 fat garlic clove, crushed
1 tbsp sumac
1 tsp dried mint
grated rind of 2 lemons and juice of 1½
4 tbsp olive oil
